name: J1939TestCommandedAddress
title: J1939TestCommandedAddress
syntax: long J1939TestCommandedAddress( dbNode aclNode, dword caSA, dword newAddress, dword timeout, dword options )
description: A commanded address message (0xFED8) is sent. The addressed node must send the ACL message (0xEE00) within the timeout from the new address.

parameters.name: caSA
parameters.description: send CA message with this source address
